calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Xiang He Lei, Administrator in Pro Per.

The Court inquired about access to a Robinhood account associated with the decedent. Mr. Lei stated that he has not been able to access the Robinhood account despite repeated attempts to contact the company. He found a 1099 form from 2020 that showed a value of over $34,000. Due to the difficulty in accessing the account, the petitioner initially considered abandoning the effort. The Court encouraged Mr. Lei to continue efforts to access the account.

After discussion, the court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant. An omnibus clause will be added to the order to allow for future distribution of the Robinhood account should access be obtained.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Jul-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Xiang Lei in propria persona.

The court noted that it received the inventory and appraisal that was filed last Friday and that it appears that the information regarding the values of the assets was done by the petitioner. Mr. Lei confirmed that he had done so, stated that his daughter had an account with Meryl Lynch, that it is very simple, and that he contacted the bank and his daughter's employer. The court explained that a probate referee had been appointed, that the law does not allow a personal representative to value the assets and that it has to be done by a probate referee. The court also provided Mr. Lei with a copy of the order appointing him as the administrator which shows that Michael Kasolas is the appointed referee and instructed him to contact Mr. Kasolas. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to July 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Xiang He Lei appeared in person in (pro per).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Amended Petition for Letters of Administration. Xiang He Lei is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on inventory and appraisal is set for May 28, 2024. Status on close of estate is set for January 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
